saved_test.name: Verb to Be: Present Forms — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for present forms of be (am, is, are): basic subject–verb agreement, negatives, questions, contractions, existential constructions, collective nouns, and formal register across A1–C2.
